entries.label: Dependency reduction
entries.description: Material reduction in dependency concentration or single-point exposure.

entries.label: New category growth offset
entries.description: New category growth offsetting concentration risk in an existing line.

entries.label: Regulatory risk resolution
entries.description: Material reduction in active regulatory pressure.

entries.label: Successful geographic supply diversification
entries.description: Production and supply dependencies diversified across more than one region.
